arts.ttl: Inside Man United's very own civil war: Current stars embroiled in public spats with club legends, fans clash with Sir Jim Ratcliffe and Jadon Sancho mocks club by suggesting Marcus Rashford is now 'free' despite still being on payroll
arts.sum: Players are taking on criticism from pundits, fans are protesting against rises such as ticketing, while social media has whipped up a storm or two for comments left on sites such as Instagram.

arts.ttl: 'Tough' - Former Manchester United coach offers theory on Marcus Rashford's exit
arts.sum: Kieran McKenna has worked with Marcus Rashford at Man Utd and the Ipswich Town boss will try and stop the forward when they face Aston Villa this weekend.

arts.ttl: Pau Torres shares injury update as Aston Villa defender closes in on return
arts.sum: Aston Villa defender Pau Torres has posted a video of his recovery as he edges closer to making a long-awaited return to action following the injury he suffered back in December, in the 2-2 draw at home to Brighton and Hove Albion. Pau Torres shares injury update as Aston Villa defender closes in on return

arts.ttl: Player believes he’s had “best match” since Aston Villa exit – Could now see turning point in career
arts.sum: Juventus midfielder Douglas Luiz believes his performance against PSV Eindhoven was the “best match” he he’s had since moving from Aston Villa. Gazzetta dello Sport cover comments from the Brazilian today in which he admits he’s hoping he’s turned a corner at the Italian club. He joined them from Aston Villa in the summer as The post Player believes he’s had “best match” since Aston Villa exit – Could now see turning point in career appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Deco reveals failed Marcus Rashford move as Barcelona chief makes "not a priority" admission
arts.sum: Barcelona sporting director Deco reveals the club made an effort to sign Marcus Rashford from Manchester United in the winter transfer window.

arts.ttl: Fantasy Premier League: The Liverpool and Aston Villa players to target for Double Gameweek 25 - with Mo Salah's predicted points revealed and a low-owned differential preferred over Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: HOLLY SHAND: A second Double Gameweek in as many weeks is just around the corner in Fantasy Premier League - and if it's as high-scoring as the last, managers are in for another treat.
